title: xLights xlDo Automation API Metadata
description: Specification of the HTTP Automation API server built into xLights and accessed via xlDo or raw HTTP requests.

ports.description: Enabled by launching xLights with '-a' (Port 49913) or '-b' (Port 49914) command-line flags, or by setting xFadePort preference in settings.

version.description: Returns the active xLights version string.

automation.description: Primary endpoint for executing JSON-formatted automation commands.
automation.requestFormat: The POST body is a single FLAT JSON object: {"cmd": "<commandName>", ...params}. Every command's own parameters (e.g. "folder", "force") must be TOP-LEVEL keys sibling to "cmd" - do NOT nest them under a "parameters"/"params" wrapper object. Verified 2026-07-18 against xLightsFrame::ProcessxlDoAutomation (src-ui-wx/automation/xLightsAutomations.cpp): it parses the body, requires a top-level "cmd" string, and for every OTHER key copies string/int/float/bool/array values into a flat parameter map - an object-typed value (e.g. a nested "parameters": {...}) matches none of those branches and is SILENTLY DROPPED, so the command receives that parameter as empty/missing with no error. A misshapen changeShowFolder call with folder nested under "parameters" produced 'Folder does not exist.' instead of a shape/validation error, because the handler just saw an empty folder string. Correct example: {"cmd":"changeShowFolder","folder":"/path/to/showfolder","force":true}. Success/failure is signaled by the HTTP status code (200 = success; 503 = command-specific rejection, e.g. unsaved changes; 504 = missing "cmd"), with a small JSON body such as {"msg":"..."} or command-specific fields - curl callers should check the status code (e.g. `curl -i` or `-w '%{http_code}'`), not just whether a body came back, since some successful responses can be entirely absent (e.g. changeShowFolder on success).

commands.name: saveLayout
commands.description: Saves layout changes (xlights_rgbeffects.xml) and setup network/controller changes (xlights_networks.xml) to disk.

commands.name: changeShowFolder
commands.description: Changes the active show folder and reloads all layout/network configurations from disk.

parameters.name: folder
parameters.description: Absolute path to the new show folder.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force change folder even if there are unsaved changes.

commands.name: getShowFolder
commands.description: Retrieves the active show folder path.

commands.name: listSequences
commands.description: Lists all sequence files (.xsq, .xsqz, .zip, .piz) in a given folder.

parameters.name: folder
parameters.description: Absolute path to the target folder.

commands.name: getSequenceInfo
commands.description: Returns metadata about a sequence file.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Path to the sequence file.

commands.name: openSequence
commands.description: Opens a sequence in the sequencer.

parameters.name: seq
parameters.description: Path to the sequence file.

parameters.name: promptIssues
parameters.description: If true, prompts for warnings/issues on load.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Forces opening even if another sequence has unsaved changes.

commands.name: closeSequence
commands.description: Closes the active sequence.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Closes even if there are unsaved changes.

parameters.name: quiet
parameters.description: Suppress warning if no sequence is open.

commands.name: newSequence
commands.description: Creates a new sequence.

parameters.name: mediaFile
parameters.description: Path to the audio/video media file.

parameters.name: durationSecs
parameters.description: Duration in seconds (required if no media file).

parameters.name: frameMS
parameters.description: Timing interval in milliseconds.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Name of the starting grid view.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Forces new creation even if active sequence has unsaved changes.

commands.name: saveSequence
commands.description: Saves the open sequence.

parameters.name: seq
parameters.description: Save-as path (optional; overrides active file name).

commands.name: renderAll
commands.description: Renders all effects in the active sequence.

parameters.name: highdef
parameters.description: Forces high-definition rendering mode.

commands.name: batchRender
commands.description: Renders multiple sequences in batch mode.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: List of sequence file paths to render.

parameters.name: lowdef
parameters.description: Render in low definition to speed up rendering.

commands.name: uploadController
commands.description: Uploads configuration to a controller.

parameters.name: controller
parameters.description: Name of the controller to upload to.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Forces upload regardless of state.

commands.name: uploadFPPConfig
commands.description: Uploads network and layout configuration to FPP.

commands.name: uploadSequence
commands.description: Uploads the sequence and media to the controller.

parameters.name: controller
parameters.description: Name of the target controller.

commands.name: checkSequence
commands.description: Runs validation checks on a sequence and returns the output log.

parameters.name: seq
parameters.description: Path to the sequence file to check.

commands.name: openController
commands.description: Opens the configuration page of a controller in the default browser.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP address of the controller.

commands.name: exportModelsCSV
commands.description: Exports layout models configuration to a CSV file.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Output path of the CSV.

commands.name: exportModel
commands.description: Exports a specific model layout to a file.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Name of the model.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Target filename.

commands.name: closexLights
commands.description: Shuts down the xLights application instance.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force shutdown even with unsaved changes.

commands.name: lightsOn
commands.description: Enables output to lights.

commands.name: lightsOff
commands.description: Disables output to lights.

commands.name: playJukebox
commands.description: Plays Jukebox item.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: 0-based index of the jukebox item to trigger.

commands.name: getModels
commands.description: Lists all configured models in the active layout.

commands.name: getModel
commands.description: Retrieves configuration details of a specific model.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Name of the model.

commands.name: getControllers
commands.description: Lists all configured controllers.

commands.name: getControllerIPs
commands.description: Lists IP addresses of all configured controllers.

commands.name: addEffect
commands.description: Adds an effect to the sequence timeline.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Name of the target model or group.

parameters.name: layer
parameters.description: Target layer index.

parameters.name: effectType
parameters.description: Type/name of the effect to add (e.g. 'Fire', 'Bars').

parameters.name: startMS
parameters.description: Start time in milliseconds.

parameters.name: endMS
parameters.description: End time in milliseconds.

commands.name: setModelProperty
commands.description: Modifies a setting on a layout model.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Name of the model.

parameters.name: property
parameters.description: XML attribute/property key to change.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: New value.

commands.name: runScript
commands.description: Runs a custom script (e.g., Python/Lua).

parameters.name: script
parameters.description: Path to the script file.
